name: Rigid Body From Mesh
description: Construct a RigidBody from a Rhino mesh. The same mesh is used for collision checking unless a separate `collision_mesh` is provided.

inputParameters.name: visual_mesh
inputParameters.description: Rhino mesh for visualization (and collision checking if no separate collision mesh is provided).

inputParameters.name: collision_mesh
inputParameters.description: Optional Rhino mesh used only for collision checking. Defaults to `visual_mesh`.

inputParameters.name: native_scale
inputParameters.description: Scale factor: user_value * native_scale = meters. Use 0.001 for millimeter documents. Defaults to 1.0.
